---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**

What pain are you feeling? Describe the situation and why the current
behaviour is not enough. Concrete examples help.

**Proposed solution**

What would work for you? API sketch / command / UX, as concrete as you can
make it.

**Alternatives considered**

Other approaches you thought about and why they are worse.

**Additional context**

Links, prior art in other tools, related issues.
